results.query: Compare Bronze and Gold Health Plans.
results.gold_answer_reference_only: Hello! Bronze Health Plan has coverage of ₹5 Lakhs and premium of ₹500/month. Gold Health Plan has coverage of ₹25 Lakhs and premium of ₹2000/month. Gold gives higher family protection, while Bronze is more affordable.

The Gold Health Plan provides ₹25 Lakhs coverage at ₹2000/month and is designed for families with children or users wanting higher coverage. Bronze is more affordable, while Gold offers stronger family protection.
reasons: Bronze is more affordable and suitable for basic health protection.
